channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Grass needs cutting please, 12th May
item.description:
Thankyou x

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 42,44, Broom Avenue, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge potholes from harvester down past fire brigade building, 12th May
item.description:
This whole part of main road needs urgent attention please - cyclists riding on wrong side of the road to avoid falling off their bikes . Thankyou x
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 167, Main Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Heavy tree branches and limbs are falling, 12th May
item.description:
I am writing to formally report a recurring safety hazard regarding the Acer pseudoplatanus (Tree Code: 974722). Large branches and limbs are falling onto the public pavement and my private driveway, posing a significant risk of injury to pedestrians and residents. This issue was previously reported last year (Enquiry Ref: 252), yet no action has been taken. Furthermore, my previous report never appeared on the public portal. Given the immediate physical danger, I request an urgent inspection and maintenance of this tree.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): High Grove, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped pallet, 12th May
item.description:
Dumped pallet I reported it last week and had reply back from council saying contractor couldn’t find it, it’s clearly still outside 8 park hill br1 2jh

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Hill, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ongoing disregard to fouling notices Detached huge property opposite slade green baptist church on Elm Road., 12th May
item.description:
We are fed up of clearing dog mess from someone who is blatantly disregarding the newly painted stencils. we have contacted our local MP and today it was referred to the Environmental Department who as ked us to contact this department to get the pavement cleaned every time this happens.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Slade Green Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Whymark Avenue, Harringay, Greater London

item.title: Absolute mess litter, 12th May

From the garage that was broken into now home to squatters

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Howard Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Corner of Alice St and Decima St, 12th May
item.description:
A green Southwark bin has been left here, which is not the correct location. People have filled it with rubbish and because this is not a correct bin location is it simply attracting litter. I already reported this bin as part if a larger issue, but it was not removed, despite the report being updated as resolved.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Decima Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excess sand on road and pavements, 12th May
item.description:
Due to recent developments on the street and windy weather there is a considerable amount of sand on the street and pavements blowing onto people’s property’s and vehicles.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 96, Hurst Road, Northumberland Heath, Erith, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped vehicle in Union Road, 12th May
item.description:
This car has no road tax or mot and has been at this location for 11 weeks now.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Union Road, Southborough, Greater London

item.title: Dog fouling, 12th May
item.description:
The woman who lives at 2 Clive road walks around letting her dog foul everywhere. I offered her a dog bag and she said does not care. This has happened on numerous occasions.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clive Avenue, Joydens Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bin dumped Burnt Ash Hill SE12 0AB, 12th May
item.description:
Black wheelie bin dumped in Burnt Ash Hill between Lee railway bridge and the small electrical recycling bin. It’s overflowing with rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burnt Ash Road, Blackheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded canisters, 12th May
item.description:
Canisters have been discarded on the street, I believe these canisters are used to inflate balloons for drug use. Photo one was the first drop and photo two is three days later and more have been discarded.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cedarhurst Drive, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet
